summary: Iteration 167: Tested and fixed Perizia/Rilievo photo upload, recalc with accesso_difficile/smaltimento/sconto_cortesia, commessa linking, sidebar navigation. All 26 backend tests pass.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: create_perizia() was not saving smaltimento, accesso_difficile, sconto_cortesia, commessa_id fields
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added these fields to both calc_voci_costo() call and doc dict

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: update_perizia() was not handling boolean/float fields properly (False values were skipped)
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added explicit handling for smaltimento, accesso_difficile, sconto_cortesia with is not None checks
Added commessa_id: Optional[str] = None to RilievoResponse

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: create_rilievo() was not saving commessa_id field
update_rilievo() was not handling commessa_id updates

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend requires Google Auth for testing. Code review confirms implementation is correct: PeriziaEditorPage and RilievoEditorPage have FormData photo upload, getPhotoSrc with proxy URL, commessa linking buttons with data-testids, DashboardLayout has Rilievi under 'Sopralluoghi & Perizie' group.

critical_code_review_comments: All requested BUGs (1-4) and GAPs (1-3) are implemented correctly after fixes
PDF services (rilievo_pdf_service.py, perizia_pdf_service.py) correctly handle both storage_path and legacy base64 formats
Sopralluogo audit trail correctly uses entity_type='sopralluogo'
seed_data_creation: Created test user session_iter167_1772998028952, client_test167, com_test167 for backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests cover: Perizia create/update with smaltimento/accesso_difficile/sconto_cortesia, recalc generating ACC.01/SMA.01/SCO.01 voci, photo upload/delete/proxy, commessa linking. Rilievo tests cover: photo upload/delete/proxy, sketch upload/delete, commessa linking. Frontend requires Google Auth login - code review shows correct implementation of FormData uploads, proxy URLs, commessa linking dialogs.

test_features_verified.BUG_1: PASSED - PUT /api/perizie/{id} accepts smaltimento/accesso_difficile/sconto_cortesia, POST /api/perizie/{id}/recalc generates ACC.01/SMA.01/SCO.01 voci
test_features_verified.BUG_2: PASSED - Audit trail in sopralluogo.py uses entity_type='sopralluogo'
test_features_verified.BUG_3: PASSED - Perizia photo upload/delete/proxy endpoints working
test_features_verified.BUG_4: PASSED - Rilievo photo/sketch upload/delete/proxy endpoints working
test_features_verified.GAP_3: VERIFIED via code review - DashboardLayout has Rilievi under 'Sopralluoghi & Perizie' group
test_features_verified.PDF_Rilievo: VERIFIED via code review - _load_photo_image() and _load_sketch_bg() handle storage_path and legacy base64
test_features_verified.PDF_Perizia: VERIFIED via code review - cost table shows Subtotale lavori, Magg. accesso difficile (+15%), Sconto cortesia, TOTALE PERIZIA
